title: Tallyho: T-80 Gunner Sights
description: T-80 primary and night vision sights for Tallyho mod
body:
# Tallyho: T-80 Gunner Sights
This **resource pack** replaces **Tallyho mod's** "**scope**" and "**thermal**" textures in order to look like T-80s sights. Both "scope" and "thermal" textures changed.

![Original vs T-80 Scope Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa9083ee41fced529e04215379a6c28e9b8e5994.png)

**Resource pack** changes only gui sights and doesn't change textures or models of the scope blocks themselves.

**It's visual only resource pack.**
All elements of sight such as range ladder, stadiametric rangefinder, ballistic computer's range display are totally cosmetic elements and don't work as intended (especially if you fight non 1:1 scale tanks).
